description_for_human: x402-paid approval gates and command-risk scoring for AI agents before wallet spend, deployments, token launches, destructive actions, social posts, or credential access.
description_for_model: Use Agent Commerce Guard to evaluate autonomous-agent action manifests before financial, deployment, social, token, destructive-command, wallet, or credential-risk actions. The paid policy endpoint is POST https://agent-commerce-guard.vercel.app/api/x402-evaluate and costs 1 USDC on Base mainnet through x402. Free discovery is available at /openapi.json, /.well-known/x402, /offer.json, /package-metadata.json, and /llms.txt. This GitHub Pages mirror exposes the same OpenAPI schema at https://fxjim.github.io/agent-commerce-guard/openapi.json while paid API calls still use the Vercel server declared in the OpenAPI servers list.
